title: sorbus japonica f. denudata
intro: Sorbus japonica f. denudata, also known as the Japanese rowan or naked rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Sorbus japonica f. denudata are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
